## KPI Summary

| KPI                        | Target | Actual | Trend        | Status           |
| -------------------------- | ------ | ------ | ------------ | ---------------- |
| Suggestion Acceptance Rate | 75%+   | [%]    | up/down/flat | Green/Yellow/Red |
| First-Pass CI Success      | 85%+   | [%]    | up/down/flat | Green/Yellow/Red |
| Test Coverage              | 80%+   | [%]    | up/down/flat | Green/Yellow/Red |
| Code Review Cycle Time     | <=24h  | [h]    | up/down/flat | Green/Yellow/Red |
| Regression Rate            | ~0     | [%]    | up/down/flat | Green/Yellow/Red |

## Scoring Rubric

| Score | Rating            | Criteria                        |
| ----- | ----------------- | ------------------------------- |
| 5     | Exceptional       | All KPIs exceed targets by 10%+ |
| 4     | Excellent         | All KPIs at/above target        |
| 3     | Satisfactory      | 80%+ of KPIs on track           |
| 2     | Needs Improvement | 60-80% of KPIs on track         |
| 1     | Critical          | <60% of KPIs met                |
